name: The Podcast ECoG Dataset
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds005574) of 9 epilepsy patients with intracranial (ECoG) recordings while listening to a ~30-minute naturalistic podcast. A rare high-resolution electrophysiological resource for naturalistic language comprehension.
citation: Zada Z, et al. (2025). The 'Podcast' ECoG dataset for modeling neural activity during natural language comprehension. bioRxiv.
